overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a third-person character walking through urban streets in Los Santos. The character navigates sidewalks and intersections near an industrial area with a prominent water tower, while occasional vehicles pass by under streetlights.

events.description: garbage truck approaches intersection from the right

agents.ego_description: walking along concrete sidewalk toward the intersection, passing palm trees

notable_agents.action: garbage truck approaching the intersection from the right

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with orange and red lights glowing in the distance
tall pole with traffic lights and street lamp attached
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
concrete pavement with visible cracks and texture
illuminated street lamp casting yellow light on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk at night toward an intersection. A billboard with orange lights glows in the distance, and a garbage truck approaches from the right. Palm trees line the left side of the street under artificial street lighting.

events.description: garbage truck passes by in front of the character
black car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: standing at the corner waiting for vehicles to pass before crossing the street

notable_agents.action: garbage truck driving past the character through the intersection
black car approaching and driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large cylindrical water tower with supporting structure visible in the distance
dark asphalt road surface with white lane markings

segments.scene_description: Waiting at the street corner as a garbage truck passes by, followed by a black car driving through the intersection. The water tower becomes visible in the distance against the night sky, and the ground transitions from sidewalk to asphalt crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with industrial buildings and water tower view

events.description: character crosses the street and begins walking along the road

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and walking along the asphalt road toward the water tower

entered.detail: black metal fence railing running along the right side of the road
large industrial warehouse building with flat roof
circular metal manhole cover on the road surface

segments.scene_description: Crossing the street and walking along an asphalt road with a metal railing on the right. Industrial buildings line the street as the water tower grows larger in the center view, and the character moves away from the intersection traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection near water tower with crosswalks

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic lights
turning left while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection near the water tower, turning slightly left to cross

entered.detail: painted white zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
white regulatory sign with black text reading DO NOT BLOCK
multiple traffic signal lights showing red

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing an intersection near the illuminated water tower. Traffic lights show red as the character crosses the white crosswalk lines, with the water tower shifting to the left side of the frame. A DO NOT BLOCK sign is visible on the left as the character turns slightly while crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime urban district that transitions from a palm-lined sidewalk into a stark industrial zone dominated by a towering water tower. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk toward an intersection, passing under artificial streetlights while a glowing orange billboard and an approaching garbage truck define the horizon. As the camera reaches the street corner, the view shifts from the sidewalk to an asphalt crosswalk, pausing briefly as the garbage truck and a black car clear the intersection. The scene then expands across the road and along a metal railing, moving past industrial buildings as the distant water tower grows larger and more central in the frame. Finally, the camera crosses a second intersection under red traffic lights, passing a do not block sign as the illuminated water tower shifts to the left of the view.
